mapper.select:
SELECT id, part_code AS partCode, part_name AS partName, standard_code AS standardCode, standard_name AS standardName, method, profession, oil_feed_type AS oilFeedType, feed_point AS feedPoint, oil_models AS oilModels, oil_volume AS oilVolume, next_check_time AS nextCheckTime, creator_id AS creatorId, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM lubrication_standard
AND part_code = #{partCode} AND standard_code = #{standardCode} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}

SELECT id, part_code AS partCode, part_name AS partName, standard_code AS standardCode, standard_name AS standardName, method, profession, oil_feed_type AS oilFeedType, feed_point AS feedPoint, oil_models AS oilModels, oil_volume AS oilVolume, next_check_time AS nextCheckTime, creator_id AS creatorId, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM lubrication_standard WHERE id = #{id}
AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO lubrication_standard
part_code, part_name, standard_code, standard_name, method, profession, oil_feed_type, feed_point, oil_models, oil_volume, next_check_time, creator_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{partCode}, #{partName}, #{standardCode}, #{standardName}, #{method}, #{profession}, #{oilFeedType}, #{feedPoint}, #{oilModels}, #{oilVolume}, #{nextCheckTime}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
